source_detail: Average Effective Tariff Rate — Policy through November 17, Pre-Substitution
title: Average Effective Tariff Rate
subtitle: Policy through November 17, Pre-Substitution
notes: Shows the trajectory of the average effective tariff rate on US goods imports under policies announced through November 17, 2025.
'Pre-substitution' means the estimate does not adjust for consumer or supplier substitution away from higher-tariff goods — it applies the announced rates to the pre-tariff import mix.
Series includes the April 2 'Liberation Day' reciprocal tariffs spike (~28%), subsequent pauses and legal adjustments, and settles near 16.8% by mid-November.
